gt_sql: SELECT T1.ID, T2.`T-CHO` FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID ORDER BY T2.`T-CHO` DESC, T1.Birthday ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT p.ID, l."T-CHO"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
ORDER BY l."T-CHO" DESC, p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;
question: Who is the oldest patient with the highest total cholesterol (T-CHO). State the patient ID and T-CHO index.
